title: lygodium volubile var. intermedium
intro: Lygodium volubile var. intermedium is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Lygodiaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Lygodium volubile var. intermedium include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. In traditional herbal medicine, Lygodium volubile var. intermedium is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties, and is also used in poultices to treat skin conditions.
